name: Succulent Squirrel
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the squirrels in a large bowl of fresh water with 1/4 cup salt and refrigerate overnight.
2. The next day, rinse the squirrels and place them on their backs in a cake pan.
3. Pour Italian dressing over the squirrels and return them to the refrigerator for 4 to 6 hours.
4. On a sheet of aluminum foil large enough to wrap one squirrel:
- Place a layer of sliced onions and potatoes.
- Put one dressed squirrel on its back on top of the veggies, sprinkling with black pepper, paprika, celery seed, and sage (use sparingly).
- Sprinkle bacon bits inside the body cavity.
- Stuff the cavity with thin slices of carrots.
- Pour barbecue sauce to taste over the stuffing.
- Place a layer of onions and thinly sliced potatoes on top.
5. Cover each squirrel tightly with two layers of aluminum foil, ensuring no holes are punctured.
6. Grill the four servings on a double-burner gas grill with the lid closed at low temperature for 45 minutes, turning every 10 to 15 minutes.
